name: WP-TAIL-drop-legacy: drop legacy identity tables and readers (clean-cut close)
description: Clean-cut tail — the irreversible teardown of the legacy identity model: drop legacy tables + remove legacy readers/types/keys (clean-up-all-artifacts rule) only after a verified re-seed (WP-TAIL-reseed). The migration carries a ## Rollback section per repo schema-safety rules (rollback = impossible post-drop; stated explicitly). Closes the clean-cut.
acceptanceCriteria: No legacy identity table/reader/type remains; full project grep clean of legacy identity artifacts; tests green post-drop; migration carries a ## Rollback section stating rollback is impossible post-drop. Findings: tail-op (no F-ID). Source of truth: _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 WP-TAIL-drop-legacy (commit 23d0c01ad)
bodyText:
Bundle brief (transcribed from the frozen Phase-O master plan SS1, WP-TAIL-drop-legacy - source of truth at commit 23d0c01ad):
Bundle rationale: the irreversible teardown of the legacy model; closes the clean-cut.
Strategy: drop legacy tables + remove legacy readers only after a verified re-seed; the migration carries a ## Rollback section per repo schema-safety rules (rollback = impossible post-drop; state so explicitly in the migration).
Scope: IN - drop legacy tables + delete legacy readers/types/keys (clean-up-all-artifacts rule). OUT - nothing.
Findings: tail-op (no F-ID).
Acceptance criteria: no legacy identity table/reader/type remains; full project grep clean of legacy identity artifacts; tests green post-drop.
Risk & blast radius: S / risky - irreversible drop. Executor protocol hard rule applies: destructive shared-infra step - STOP and report exact planned commands pre-execution; shepherd go required.
Notes: depends on WP-TAIL-reseed (WI-585). This WP closes the clean-cut bar: legacy identity tables/readers dropped, full project grep clean, tests green post-drop.
